contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 70
- Description: Security dashboard: scoring recalibration, EC2 SG audit artifact, landing nav
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/28
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/29
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/174
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/287
  
  Details:
  Recalibrated the security score (correct section keys + per-category caps + don't penalize unknowns) so it reflects real posture instead of a constant 100; with full admin PAT coverage the dashboard now shows secret scanning disabled org-wide and no branch protection, scoring a meaningful 35/D. Ran a read-only EC2 security-group audit across both AWS accounts and committed an artifact to Cypher-Defense containing findings (critical: us-east-1 default SG is all-traffic world-open on 16 running prod instances incl Redis/Postgres/dao_protocol/SSH), a target role-scoped SG architecture, and a phased reversible execution roadmap. Added a Security Dashboard nav link (Resources dropdown + footer) on the truesight.me landing page, and filed a follow-up to rotate the scanner to dedicated read-only IAM keys.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
